rulings.Calendar Matter: MOTION FOR SUMMARY ADJUDICATION
rulings.Rulings: On calendar for Monday, June 18, 2007, Line 1 DEFENDANT JAMES APPENDROT'S MOTION FOR SUMMARY ADJUDICATION IS GRANTED. PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM FOR ELDER ABUSE IS TIME BARRED. PLAINTIFF HAS PRESENTED NO EVIDENCE SUFFICIENT TO RAISE A TRIABLE ISSUE OF MATERIAL FACTS THAT DEFENDANT IS ESTOPPED BY VIRTUE OF BREAKING THE PARTIES SETTLEMENT AGREEMENTS. PLAINTIFF'S REMEDY FOR THAT BREACH IS THEIR PENDING BREACH OF CONTRACT CLAIM. =(301/PJB/X-DS)
